objects.text:
Hello, I am Juliana Silva, a visual/user experience designer with over two years of experience. Create products people love by applying my creative perspective and solving problems creatively. 

I have skills in User Experience Design (UXD), user-centered Design, Interaction and Visual Design for websites, applications, web, and mobile products, wireframes, mockups, qualitative and quantitative user studies, usability analysis, and informal usability audits.
Won the top prize in the international UI/UX design championships and events

Mobile design
Adaptive Design
Quick prototyping
Usability design
UX Analysis
Lean UI and UX
